conventions: The project's coding rules, distilled to ~10 lines: error-handling pattern, logging rules, validation/schema conventions, strictness level, what counts as a defect here. The reviewer judges against these; deviations become 'convention' findings.

gates.build: SHELL COMMAND that lints/compiles — non-zero exit means FAIL (must always pass)
gates.test: SHELL COMMAND that runs the test suite (must be GREEN before you start resolve)
gates.testSetup: Notes for authoring + running tests: how to scope a single test, runner quirks, container exec prefix, fixtures/DB isolation.

baselineNote: Describe any EXPECTED pre-existing working-tree changes so they are folded into the staged baseline rather than treated as batch work. Omit if the tree is clean.
